$orderId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['productId', 'productName', 'productPrice', 'customerName', 'customerPhone', 'nextOrderDiscount', 'status', 'createdAt']) && newData.child('productId').isString() && newData.child('productName').isString() && newData.child('productPrice').isNumber() && newData.child('customerName').isString() && newData.child('customerName').val().length >= 2 && newData.child('customerName').val().length <= 60 && newData.child('customerPhone').isString() && newData.child('customerPhone').val().length >= 1 && newData.child('nextOrderDiscount').isNumber() && (newData.child('nextOrderDiscount').val() === 500 || newData.child('nextOrderDiscount').val() === 1000 || newData.child('nextOrderDiscount').val() === 1500 || newData.child('nextOrderDiscount').val() === 2000) && newData.child('status').val() === 'new' && newData.child('createdAt').isString()
